## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Asad Faruqi and growthx.ai for content editing and writing services.](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai needs editors/writers to scale content production, particularly for technical topics (security, web development)](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Asad has 11 years of content writing experience, including technical writing and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Trial basis agreed: Asad to review one article after returning from a conference, then discuss hourly rate](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Payment method to be determined; Jason to research options for international contractors](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Content Needs

  - [Struggling to keep up with client content demands](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Mix of AI-generated content and human editing/writing](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Need expertise in security concepts and front-end engineering](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Looking for editors to review, refine, and sometimes rewrite AI-generated drafts](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Weekly content delivery cadence with clients](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

### Asad's Background and Expertise

  - [11 years in content writing, including management roles](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Technical writing experience (5 years in Canada)](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Familiar with security concepts, cloud computing, API documentation](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Founded Blue Quartz Communications, offering marketing copywriting, technical documentation, and personal branding services](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Experience with various content management and project tools (Confluence, Jira, ReadMe, WordPress)](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Content Examples and Workflow

  - [Jason shared examples of Webflow documentation and API guides](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [growthx.ai generates initial drafts, needs final editing and quality checks](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Asad to review and refine content, ensuring it meets client needs and targets keywords effectively](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Potential for Asad to provide feedback on content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### Trial Arrangement

  - [Start with one article to assess Asad's skills and fit](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Asad to track time spent and propose an hourly rate after review](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [First assignment to be sent soon, due after Asad returns from a documentation conference (approx. 1.5 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Payment and Logistics

  - [Asad prefers PayPal, but growthx.ai may have different options](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Jason to research payment methods for international contractors (e.g., Deal)](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Asad to send additional technical writing samples and portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send a sample article for Asad to review](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Asad to provide technical writing samples and portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [Jason to research and communicate payment options for international contractors](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Reassess collaboration after first article review, discuss hourly rate and potential ongoing work](https://fathom.video/share/g-wshvbJxhqY_odigFpKssqFBWseFt-K?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
